---
title: "Michael Camponovo"
---

This portfolio documents my work as a GIS educator, outreach coordinator, community-engaged geospatial practitioner, and mentor.

My work connects geospatial technology with teaching, professional development, community projects, and student success. I develop applied GIS and UAV learning experiences, support public-facing geospatial outreach, collaborate on community mapping projects, and mentor students as they build technical skills and professional pathways.

Use the sections below to explore selected work in teaching, workshops and outreach, community GIS projects, geospatial products, mentoring, service, and professional recognition.

## Explore My Work

- [**Teaching**](teaching.qmd)  
  Applied GIS, cartography, UAVs, remote sensing, spatial analysis, and professional preparation.

- [**Workshops & Outreach**](outreach.qmd)  
  FAA Part 107 education, GIS professional development, K--12 educator support, and public-facing geospatial training.

- [**Community GIS Projects**](community-projects.qmd)  
  Applied mapping, UAV, remote sensing, and geospatial projects developed with community partners and students.

- [**Geospatial Portfolio**](geospatial-portfolio.qmd)  
  Selected maps, web applications, UAV products, cartographic outputs, spatial analyses, and geospatial communication materials.

- [**Mentoring & Student Success**](mentoring.qmd)  
  Undergraduate research, conference preparation, career pathways, professional networking, and student development.

- [**Service & Leadership**](service.qmd)  
  Professional organization service, program development, conference planning, outreach leadership, and community engagement.

- [**Awards & Recognition**](awards.qmd)  
  Selected external recognition related to GIS education, cartography, outreach, service, and community-engaged geospatial work.
